FFlagAppChatDeprecateOldTCModal2_Staged.purpose: Streamlines the chat experience for players, making it more user-friendly.

FFlagPlayerSearchEnableOnlineFrequentsFo.mechanism: Allows all players to see frequently online friends in the player search feature.
FFlagPlayerSearchEnableOnlineFrequentsFo.purpose: Makes it easier for players to connect with friends who are often online.

DFIntSimSolverImprovedPartialSleepTolera.mechanism: Enhances the simulation solver to better handle partial sleep states in game places.
DFIntSimSolverImprovedPartialSleepTolera.purpose: Improves game stability and performance during complex simulations.

FFlagRecentsWidgetTelemetryEnabled_Stage.mechanism: Activates tracking for the usage of the recent items widget.
FFlagRecentsWidgetTelemetryEnabled_Stage.purpose: Helps developers understand player interactions with recent items, leading to better features.

DFIntAndroidActivityLifecycleHistoryMaxC.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many activity states are stored in memory for Android devices.
DFIntAndroidActivityLifecycleHistoryMaxC.purpose: Improves performance and stability of the game on Android by managing memory usage better.
